EmailTemplate.name: Receipt
EmailTemplate.subject: Receipt for your Insurance
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
Please find your receipt attached, as requested.
If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to contact us.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
